title: Al Forthan — Jan 2021 prep + Charlee stats SOS
html:
TL;DR

  • 17yo Yahir titles the note "AL FORTHAN ********" — explicit prep flag for the Al Forthan Memorial Scholarship application — but the actual content is a peer SOS to Charlee: "do you know the concepts behind the stats test tomorrow? I slept through some classes on accident and am lost.."
  • The asterisks-in-title (***) signal Yahir's high-priority flagging convention in
  • Co-located with the Jan 17 public speaking self feedback — Yahir is in Al Forthan oration-prep mode the week before the deadline
  • The "slept through some classes on accident" admission is Yahir in rare unguarded mode — the high-school-overachiever-who-also-sleeps-through-class composite is one of the realer self-portraits in the corpus
  • Charlee enters the corpus here as the academic peer Yahir reaches out to in low-stakes academic emergencies — first verifiable mention

Notes

The note has a deceptively simple structure: title is the high-stakes scholarship, body is a low-stakes peer SOS. They're almost certainly not the same thread — the title is reminder-to-self-about-the-scholarship-deadline; the body is a separate text-draft to Charlee about the next-day stats test. The doesn't honor topic-coherence.

The asterisks (*******) are Yahir's homemade priority-flag system in 2020-2021 Apple Notes — see also 2021 04 10 ford osu prep todos "Al Forthan, ON THE 21ST" in shouty-caps. The Jan 22 date sits 6 days after the Jan 17 public speaking critique note, confirming the Al Forthan oration was the immediate context for that speech-coaching session.

The fact that this is the third in-corpus reference to Al Forthan (after 2021 04 10 ford osu prep todos and 2025 08 13 plan for austin) means the Al Forthan entity-page can drop its #stub tag — the densification threshold is met. Flagged in this ingest's stub-stats.

Charlee is a single-mention so far; queued for stub on second mention.

Connections
